svg.text: Substrate C, expanded: network & graph features
In an event ontology the graph is not given — events induce the edges. Decide the graph, then the time representation, then read off families by radius.

svg.text: Signal = temporal synchrony (activity cross-correlation, phase-locking, tight inter-arrival Δt) × anomalous co-affiliation (bipartite projection edge-weight z-scored vs a configuration null) ×
SBM surprise (sudden block densification, motifs over-represented relative to a TIMESTAMP-SHUFFLED null). The temporal null model is what separates coordination from popularity.
dots = cost. ●●● = centralities / SBM / TDA / embeddings
